title: [codereview-pass2 post-string] validate_name misused for string value
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/senml/senml.c:173 - validate_name() called on string value but function name and MAX_NAME_LEN suggest it's for 'n' field only. Should have dedicated validate_string or updated constant. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-pp9k
notes: Commit: 509087688. Added validate_string, senml_add_string impl, updated encode_record validation and VS encoding support to fix name validator misuse on string values. 6 files updated in commit.
